summary: Collapsible, user-safe summary of agent work steps without private reasoning.
useWhen: An agent response benefits from concise progress or completion summaries.
avoidWhen: The content would reveal private chain-of-thought, hidden prompts, secrets, or raw internal traces.
accessibility: Each step has textual state and description; animation and color are supplementary.
The disclosure uses native keyboard and expanded-state semantics.
states: Pending, active, complete, and error describe user-safe workflow progress.
responsiveBehavior: Steps wrap within the response width.
